summary: Plan-only review of five independent open PRs. No PR has a complete merge preflight with Codex /review evidence. One PR is security-sensitive and should be routed centrally. One narrow memory-core PR has a concrete contributor-branch repair path; the remaining PRs need maintainer review because proof, review, or scope gates are incomplete.

actions.reason: Complete merge preflight is missing for an automation-risk PR; no merge_candidate may be emitted without Codex /review and resolved-comment evidence.
The item appears to involve API keys/auth material persistence and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling without ProjectClownfish mutation.
This is an XL message-delivery compatibility change with unresolved review context and missing complete merge preflight proof.
Author/proof follow-up and failing checks block merge or fixed-by-candidate handling; the artifact lacks enough resolved bot-review detail for an automated repair recommendation.
Repair the contributor branch, rebase if needed, run focused memory-core validation plus check:changed, run Codex /review, and only then reconsider merge.

needs_human: #84453: maintainer must review automation-risk diff because complete merge preflight is missing, including Codex /review and hydrated comment resolution.
#84465: route centrally as security-sensitive because it involves API key/auth material persistence.
#84485: maintainer must decide the broad Discord message-delivery behavior change and unresolved review question before merge planning.
#84547: maintainer/author follow-up is needed because behavior proof and lint failed, and bot review comments are not hydrated.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #84554 in place: rebase or refresh the branch, address CI failures for the narrow memory-core fallback guard, run focused memory-core tests plus changed-file validation, then run Codex /review before any merge recommendation.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
Repair source PR #84554 by keeping the narrow memory-core behavior change while making the branch current and CI-clean.

## Source credit
This repair is based on https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84554 by @jetd1 / jet. Clownfish should preserve attribution in the final PR and changelog notes if user-facing release notes are needed.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run extensions/memory-core/src/memory/search-manager.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review clean before merge consideration
credit_notes: Repair should preserve contributor credit for @jetd1 / jet from source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84554.
If a replacement PR becomes necessary, the PR body must mention source PR #84554 and carry attribution to the original author.
